name: Locomotive Corporation
description: Kyoto-based Japanese developer best known in this collection for co-developing StarTropics.

eras.title: NES Collaboration Era
eras.description: Period where Locomotive appears as a small contract developer on Japanese console projects.

notes: Founded in May 1987. I did not find a clean cessation date, so `defunct` is left null until you decide how to represent unknown/inactive companies.
